# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.

Write secure code.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3.8'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=elasticsearch
      - cluster.name=elk-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled=false
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled=false
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeNow123!}
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch_data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:9200:9200"
      - "127.0.0.1:9300:9300"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    healthcheck:
      test:
        [
          "CMD-SHELL",
          "curl -s -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeNow123!} http://localhost:9200/_cluster/health | grep -qE '\"status\":\"(green|yellow)\"'"
        ]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 2g
        reservations:
          memory: 1g
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=256m

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:8.12.0
    container_name: logstash
    environment:
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.hosts=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.username=elastic
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.password=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeNow123!}
      - "LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeNow123!}
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline:ro
      - ./logstash/config/logstash.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml:ro
      - logstash_data:/usr/share/logstash/data
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5044:5044"
      - "127.0.0.1:5000:5000/tcp"
      - "127.0.0.1:5000:5000/udp"
      - "127.0.0.1:9600:9600"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        [
          "CMD-SHELL",
          "curl -s http://localhost:9600/_node/stats | grep -q '\"status\":\"green\"' || curl -s http://localhost:9600 | grep -q 'logstash'"
        ]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 90s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
        reservations:
          memory: 512m

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:8.12.0
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=kibana_system
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=${KIBANA_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeKibana123!}
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.encryptedSavedObjects.encryptionKey=${KIBANA_ENCRYPTION_KEY:-a]3@#$%^&*()_+1234567890abcdefgh}
      - xpack.reporting.encryptionKey=${KIBANA_REPORTING_KEY:-b]3@#$%^&*()_+1234567890abcdefgh}
      - xpack.security.encryptionKey=${KIBANA_SECURITY_KEY:-c]3@#$%^&*()_+1234567890abcdefgh}
      - server.host=0.0.0.0
      - server.name=kibana
      - csp.strict=true
      - csp.warnLegacyBrowsers=true
    volumes:
      - kibana_data:/usr/share/kibana/data
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5601:5601"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        [
          "CMD-SHELL",
          "curl -s http://localhost:5601/api/status | grep -q '\"overall\":{\"level\":\"available\"' || curl -s http://localhost:5601/api/status | grep -q 'available'"
        ]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 120s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
        reservations:
          memory: 512m

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:8.12.0
    container_name: apm-server
    command: >
      apm-server -e
        -E apm-server.host=0.0.0.0:8200
        -E apm-server.auth.secret_token=${APM_SECRET_TOKEN:-SuperSecretAPMToken123!}
        -E output.elasticsearch.hosts=["http://elasticsearch:9200"]
        -E output.elasticsearch.username=elastic
        -E output.elasticsearch.password=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeNow123!}
        -E setup.kibana.host=http://kibana:5601
        -E apm-server.kibana.enabled=true
        -E apm-server.kibana.host=http://kibana:5601
        -E apm-server.kibana.username=elastic
        -E apm-server.kibana.password=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeNow123!}
        -E apm-server.ssl.enabled=false
        -E apm-server.rum.enabled=true
        -E apm-server.rum.allow_origins=["${APM_RUM_ALLOW_ORIGINS:-http://localhost:*}"]
        -E apm-server.auth.anonymous.enabled=false
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    cap_add:
      - CHOWN
      - SETGID
      - SETUID
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:8200:8200"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
      kibana:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        [
          "CMD-SHELL",
          "curl -s http://localhost:8200/ | grep -q 'publish_ready'"
        ]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 512m
        reservations:
          memory: 256m
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=128m

  setup:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elk-setup
    user: "0"
    command: >
      bash -c '
        echo "Waiting for Elasticsearch to be ready...";
        until curl -s -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeNow123!} http://elasticsearch:9200/_cluster/health | grep -qE "\"status\":\"(green|yellow)\""; do
          sleep 5;
        done;
        echo "Elasticsearch is ready.";

        echo "Setting up kibana_system user password...";
        curl -s -X POST -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeNow123!} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_security/user/kibana_system/_password \
          -d "{\"password\":\"${KIBANA_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeKibana123!}\"}" ;

        echo "";
        echo "Setting up apm_system user password...";
        curl -s -X POST -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeNow123!} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_security/user/apm_system/_password \
          -d "{\"password\":\"${APM_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeAPM123!}\"}" ;

        echo "";
        echo "Creating logstash_writer role...";
        curl -s -X POST -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-ChangeMeNow123!} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_security/role/logstash_writer \
          -d "{
            \"cluster\": [\"manage_index_templates\", \"monitor\", \"manage_ilm\"],
            \"indices\": [{
              \"names\": [\"logstash-*\", \"logs-*\"],
              \"privileges\": [\"write\", \"create\", \"create_index\", \"manage\", \"manage_ilm\"]
            }]
          }" ;

        echo "";
        echo "Setup complete!";
      '
    networks:
      - elk_network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: "no"

networks:
  elk_network:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      driver: default
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16
    driver_opts:
      com.docker.network.bridge.enable_icc: "true"
      com.docker.network.bridge.enable_ip_masquerade: "true"
      com.docker.network.bridge.host_binding_ipv4: "127.0.0.1"

volumes:
  elasticsearch_data:
    driver: local
  logstash_data:
    driver: local
  kibana_data:
    driver: local
